message:
feat(net): extend TCP, WebSocket, HTTP, UDP, and TLS subsystems

TCP:
- net/tcp/socket.rs: Add TcpSocketOptions with SO_REUSEADDR,
  SO_REUSEPORT, TCP_NODELAY, keepalive, send/recv buffer sizes.
  Add set_socket_options() and get_socket_info() for runtime
  introspection. Inline tests for option application and defaults.

WebSocket:
- net/websocket/client.rs: Add WebSocket client reconnection with
  exponential backoff, ping/pong keepalive, automatic frame
  reassembly for fragmented messages, and connection state machine.
  Add send_text(), send_binary(), recv_message() high-level API.
- net/websocket/frame.rs: Refactor frame parsing to use structured
  error types instead of string errors. Add frame validation for
  control frame size limits and RSV bit checking per RFC 6455.
- net/websocket/server.rs: Add connection upgrade validation and
  Sec-WebSocket-Accept computation.
- net/websocket/split.rs: Add split() returning (ReadHalf, WriteHalf)
  with shared connection state for concurrent read/write.

HTTP:
- http/compress.rs: Add Brotli support alongside existing gzip/deflate.
  Content-Encoding negotiation via Accept-Encoding quality values.
- http/h1/http_client.rs: Fix content-length header to use exact
  body length instead of buffer capacity.
- http/h1/listener.rs: Add graceful shutdown with connection draining,
  configurable shutdown timeout, and active connection tracking.
- http/h2/error.rs: Add comprehensive unit tests for ErrorCode
  roundtrip, H2Error construction, GoAway frame handling, stream
  vs connection error classification, and Display formatting.

UDP:
- net/udp.rs: Add UdpSocket::local_addr(), set_broadcast(),
  join_multicast_v4/v6(), and recv_buf_from() for vectored receives.

TLS:
- tls/error.rs: Add TlsError variants for certificate validation,
  ALPN mismatch, and handshake timeout. Add tests for error chain
  traversal and Display formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
